creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text: This hasn't been updated yet because some newer glm version introduced regression by no longer initializing data members. This affects at least graphics/gource (there's fix for it) but I still haven't tested other consumers. Quite a lot of time has passed, so ones which are actively developed may be assumed OK, others need to be tested. Have you tested any existing consumers with new glm versions?
